---
title: "Post-crisis normalisation? The 2018 Presidential Elections"
author: "Triga, V., Mendez, F. and Tziouvas, C."
date: 2018-01-01
description: "Southern European Society and Politics"
doi: "10.1080/13608746.2018.1511347"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1080/13608746.2018.1511347](https://doi.org/10.1080/13608746.2018.1511347)
